section: Periodic Transaction Report - attached transaction table

rows.asset_name: Morgan Stanley Institutional Liquidity Fund Tax Exempt

free_text: Header: "NAME: Rohit Khanna  Page 2 of 5" (page numbers handwritten). Typed attachment table with columns: SP/DC/JT | Full Asset Name (Provide full name, not ticker symbol) | Type of Transaction (Purchase/Sale/Exchange) | Date of Transaction MM/DD/YY | Date Notified of Transaction MM/DD/YY | Amount of Transaction columns A-K ($1,001-$15,000; $15,001-$50,000; $50,001-$100,000; $100,001-$250,000; $250,001-$500,000; $500,001-$1,000,000; $1,000,001-$5,000,000; $5,000,001-$25,000,000; $25,000,001-$50,000,000; Over $50,000,000; Transaction in a Spouse or Dependent Child Asset over $1,000,000). A black band group header reading "Areco" precedes the single data row; all remaining rows on the page are blank.

uncertainties.note: group/subheader label on black band; tesseract also reads 'Areco' but the word is unusual - possibly an account name
